content.en:
Time passes.

Ye Tian mastered more and more extreme extreme paths, and the Will Pagoda was gradually engraved with one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths.

Finally, on this day, Ye Tian mastered one hundred and eight extreme extreme paths, comprehended one hundred and eight black characters, and all of them were engraved on the one hundred and eight floors of the Will Pagoda.

Airplanes!

After the one hundred and eight layers of the Will Pagoda were inscribed, Ye Tian's Extreme Dao Will was strengthened again by the Will Pagoda.

And that's not all.

Ye Tian can also continue to increase the number of layers of the Will Pagoda.

So, Ye Tian spent some time increasing the number of layers of the Will Pagoda to the point where it could not be increased.

"One hundred and sixty-three layers of Will Pagoda, this is the limit of what the Extreme Dao Will I have now can condense!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Now, the resources that he can use to improve the will of the Extreme Dao are really completely exhausted, and it can only be raised to this extent, and he needs to continue to collect the resources to improve the will of the Extreme Dao before he can continue to increase the number of layers of the Will Pagoda.

"Wait a few more years, and you will snatch away the resources of the Land of Dust!"

Ye Tian muttered.

......

Dusty Lands.

Ye Tian's replica body stayed in a void, looking at a treacherous river, this river would exude the Dust Separation Gold Liquid, and the task of these Primordial Black Beasts was to collect the Dust Separation Gold Liquid, and then store it inside a Primordial Divine Weapon for preservation.

Every once in a while, other Primordial Black Beasts would be collected.

No matter who collects it, there is no way to collect it privately, after all, many primordial black beasts are watching together, who dares to collect it privately?

Airplanes!

The river of the Strange Domain is shaking again, and it seems that there is another liquid of dust and gold about to flow out.

"No, this movement is a bit big, and it's not the dust gold liquid that was bred!!!

Ye Tian was shocked.

Soon, one after another primordial black beasts appeared, gathering more and more.

"It can't be a gold bead from the dust!"

There was a primordial black beast guessing.

The Dust Gold Bead, its value is far from being comparable to the Dust Gold Liquid, the Dust Gold Bead is a treasure that belongs to the same level as the Sunset Orb, the Dust Gold Bead can not only make the physical fitness of the primordial black beast skyrocket, it is of great use to the Quadruple Ancestor, and it can also be used to cultivate a holy art - Dust Golden Light, this is an offensive holy art!

However, the Dust Golden Light is different from other holy arts, such as the Glazed Holy Cover and the Nine Yang Sword Light, which are holy arts with a high success rate, as long as they gather all the materials and meet the cultivation conditions, if they are not too unlucky, they will be successfully cultivated.

But unlike the golden light, the success rate of this holy art cultivation is very low.

Of course, the success rate is low, but it has another advantage, that is, the cultivation conditions are low.

The Dust Separation Golden Light only needs a Dust Separation Golden Bead and thirteen extreme extremes to be cultivated, and the power is not bad.

Basically, a gold bead from the dust is not to be practiced into a gold bead from the dust, but what if you are lucky, so the value of the gold bead is very high.

"If it's really the Dust Separation Golden Bead, then the Primordial Black Beast here may notify the Nine Dust Domain soon, and I can't wait any longer. The replica body must be made to come over immediately and snatch the resources here!"

Ye Tian decided.

Immediately.

Another copy of Ye Tian's body entered the Primordial Black Sea, and then shuttled from a location near the Land of Dust.

At this moment, his replica body has come to the Dusty Land, and will enter here at any time.

As long as you confirm that this dust gold bead is really bred, then do it immediately.

Little by little, time passed.

Finally, a golden light appeared, and a bead flew out of the treacherous river.

"The gold bead from the dust is really this treasure!!!

Ye Tian was excited.

And the other Primordial Black Beasts were also extremely excited, because they had discovered such a good thing, and if they reported it, each of them would have a huge reward!

Rumble!!!!

A figure shuttled in from outside the land of dust, and it was Ye Tian.

"It's not good, there are cultivators invading !!"

The primordial black beasts in the Land of Dust reacted and immediately wanted to stop Ye Tian.

However, they simply couldn't stop it.

"Die!"

Ye Tian directly shot and killed the primordial black beast, and then grabbed the dust gold bead with one hand.

Then, Ye Tian directly crossed the void and came to the treasure house of the Land of Dust.

Almost all of the resources mined here are stored here, and they don't go to the body of a primordial black beast.

Wild primordial black beasts don't know how to collect resources, but the power of primordial black beasts is different, and their use of resources is no less than that of cultivators.

Therefore, all the resources that can be collected here have been collected resources.

Although it is collected every once in a while, there are not many resources this time, but for a force, for an individual, there are still a lot of resources here!

Rumble!!!!

The treasure house was torn apart by Ye Tian's attack.

Immediately, Ye Tian snatched the resources in the treasure house, and without killing more, he fled directly.

......

At this time, those primordial black beasts looked nervous one by one.

"What should I do, the Dust Gold Bead has been snatched away, if the Fourfold Ancestor Adults know, we won't end well!"

"You dare to hide it? The adults have all kinds of means to know about the situation here, and they can only report it truthfully. "

"And the resources have been robbed here, and they must be reported!"

"Damn, how could there be a cultivator coming in, and it happened to be just when the Dust Bead was born, I suspect that there are traitors among our primordial black beasts!!"

"I'm not a traitor!"

"Me neither!"

Soon, these primordial black beasts notified the Nine Dust Domain in a special way.

Nine Dust Domains.

The Nine Dust Ancestor quickly learned about the situation in the Land of Leaving the Dust, and he didn't need to worry about anything that happened in the Land of the Dust, but this time the Golden Bead of the Dust appeared, and it was snatched away by the cultivators, which was terrible!

How important the Dust Separation Golden Bead is, at the beginning, he also relied on the Dust Separation Golden Bead accumulated one by one over the endless years in the Land of Leaving the Dust to cultivate the Dust Separation Golden Light Holy Technique, and only then did he have the strength he has now.

Of course, the Holy Technique Inheritance of the Dust Golden Light was given to him by the Dawn Holy Ancestor, otherwise he would not be able to get the Holy Technique Inheritance as a Primordial Black Beast!

"A golden bead from the dust, which is very valuable, was actually taken away by a cultivator!!"

The Nine Dust Ancestor was annoyed.

Of course, what made him even more annoyed was that the Land of Leaving the Dust had been discovered by other cultivators, which meant that it was not safe there!
